mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( reporter_idx, reported_idx, post_idx, report_content, target_type, report_status, report_created_at ) VALUES ( #{reporter_idx}, #{reported_idx}, #{post_idx}, #{report_content}, 'POST', 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO report ( reporter_idx, reported_idx, post_idx, comment_idx, report_content, target_type, report_status, report_created_at ) VALUES ( #{reporter_idx}, #{reported_idx}, #{post_idx}, #{comment_idx}, #{report_content}, 'COMMENT', 0, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.report_idx, r.post_idx, r.report_content, r.report_created_at, r.target_type, r.report_status,
reporter.member_idx AS reporter_idx, reporter.member_nickname AS reporter_nickname,
reported.member_idx AS reported_idx, reported.member_nickname AS reported_nickname
FROM report r LEFT JOIN member reporter ON r.reporter_idx = reporter.member_idx LEFT JOIN member reported ON r.reported_idx = reported.member_idx ORDER BY r.report_created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE report_status = 0 AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE report_status = 1 AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE target_type = 'POST' AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE target_type = 'COMMENT' AND report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY)

SELECT m.member_nickname, c.*, MAX(CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'COMMENT' THEN r.report_status END) AS report_status, MAX(CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'COMMENT' THEN r.report_idx END) AS report_idx, GROUP_CONCAT( CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'COMMENT' THEN CONCAT(reporter.member_nickname, ': ', r.report_content) ELSE NULL END SEPARATOR ' ' ) AS all_report_contents FROM comment c LEFT JOIN report r ON c.comment_idx = r.comment_idx AND r.target_type = 'COMMENT' LEFT JOIN member m ON c.member_idx = m.member_idx LEFT JOIN member reporter ON r.reporter_idx = reporter.member_idx WHERE c.post_idx = #{post_idx} GROUP BY c.comment_idx ORDER BY c.comment_updated_at DESC
